# Jamallta Films

Jamallta Films is a wedding photography, cinematography, drone coverage, album design, and video editing studio based at Rabon Rd, Deoghat, Solan, Himachal Pradesh 173211, India.

## Primary Services

- Wedding photography in Solan and Himachal Pradesh
- Candid wedding photography
- Cinematic wedding videography
- Drone wedding coverage
- Pre-wedding shoots in Himachal Pradesh
- Wedding highlight video editing
- Wedding teaser and reel editing
- Photo retouching and album design
- Confidential white-label video editing for studios and production houses
